prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-10POCKETTOOLBELT-PARENT-TT Product Type: UTILITY_HOLSTER_POUCH Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 10 Pocket Suede Leather Tool Pouch Hammer Drill Tool Bag Description: The ToolTreaux tool pouch is constructed of durable yet lightweight suede leather that will ensure a long life. It features a 3 inch wide belt tunnel (belt not included) so you can easily attach it and remove it when no longer needed.

Each tool belt comes with 10 different tool pouches designed to hold small, medium and large construction tools including a hammer, wrench, screwdriver, pliers, measuring tape, utility knife, pruners, trowels, levels and more.

Our leather tool bags will attach to most standard belts, making this a great option for both men and women. Simply attach the bag to your favorite work or construction belt before your next hobby project.

Although these belts were originally designed for home improvement and construction uses, they are also great for crafting, gardening and other hobby DIY projects. Keep your tools close and organized with this belt before your next project whether it’s indoors or outdoors.

Please note: these tool belts are not customizable.

The bag also features one nickel finish metal hammer holder and reinforced corners for durability. The tool bag is an ideal companion for the Deluxe 12 Pocket Suede Tool Belt where it can attach easily for extra storage space.

Order this Deluxe Tool Bag to tackle all your home improvement jobs. You will have the confidence to do it yourself when all your tools are by your side and conveniently stored. Search Terms: electrician tool belt leather construction tool pouch add on home diy project gift for builder hammer tools home improvement construction tools for men do it yourself tool bag suede utility holster bag Features: - HEAVY-DUTY CONSTRUCTION - ToolTreaux heavy-duty tool pouch is made of high-quality, durable and lightweight suede leather that will ensure longevity. Belt tunnel fits 3 inch wide belt (belt not included) - 10 TOOL POCKETS - Tool belt comes with 10 different tool pouches made to hold different construction and hobby tools like a hammer, measuring tape, pliers, wrench, screwdriver, box cutter, level, pruners, trowels and more - ONE SIZE FITS MOST - Leather tool bag attaches to most standard belts, making it ideal for both men and women. Simply attach tool bag to your favorite work or construction belt before your next hobby project - VERSATILE TOOL BELT - Multi-use tool belt is ideal for home improvement, crafting, gardening and hobby DIY projects. Make sure you have quick access to your tools whether you’re working inside or outdoors - SPECIFICATIONS - Colors: blue, black, pink, tan; Material: suede leather; Number of pockets: 10 (2 main, 2 medium and 6 small pockets); Belt tunnel dimensions: 3” wide; Metal tape measure clip; Steel hammer holder === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 10 Pocket Suede Leather Tool Pouch Bag
